Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x5DF0 "ZIGZAG-4000-5DF0" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $4000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zig Zag.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $4000 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to start correctly. 2. Copies 512 bytes of data from $4030 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. 3. It then jumps to the entry point at $5DF0 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
Also NOP'd out the BEQ $5F4F instruction at $5F8B so that the fire button in port 2 can be used to skip the intro straight away.
